verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Down through the ages God showed His men the weather, From Noah to Elijah on the hill; If we hear what the Spirit is saying to the churches, He loves us and He sends a warning still.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh the weather forecast for the tomorrow is stormy, There are dark clouds forming in the east; But the day after that the sun will be shining, And it looks a thousand years of peace, Oh it looks like a thousand years of peace.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Just hear what the Spirit is saying to the churches, His ministers are speaking to us plain; If we make the sacrifice and offer to Him praises, Today and He will send the latter rain.
